gstin_verify.description: Verifies a GSTIN and returns registration details, compliance status, and business information.
gstin_verify.not_found: No GSTIN found for "{{id}}". Verify the format: 15 characters, starting with state code (01-37).
gstin_verify.partial: Some data unavailable from {{source}}. Partial results shown.
gstin_verify.unavailable: GSTN is currently unavailable. Showing cached data from {{date}}. Some info may be outdated.

hsn_search.description: Searches HSN/SAC codes by code number or text description.
hsn_search.not_found: No HSN codes match "{{query}}". Try a broader term or numeric code.

gst_rate_calculator.description: Calculates GST rates (CGST, SGST/IGST, cess) for a given HSN code and supply type.

gst_return_status.description: Checks GST return filing status for a GSTIN by financial year.

gstin_by_pan.description: Lists all GSTINs registered against a PAN number.

company_lookup.description: Looks up a company on the MCA registry by CIN, name, or PAN.
company_lookup.not_found: No company found matching "{{id}}". Try searching by exact CIN or company name.

director_search.description: Searches for director information by DIN (Director Identification Number).

cin_validate.description: Validates a CIN and extracts embedded company metadata.

compliance_check.description: Checks MCA compliance status including filing deadlines and overdue returns.

director_network.description: Maps all companies associated with a director by DIN.

risk_score.low_confidence: Risk Score: {{score}}/10 (Low Confidence) — {{available}}/{{total}} signals available. Assess with caution.
risk_score.unavailable: Risk scoring unavailable. Raw data provided.

error.upstream_unavailable: {{source}} is currently unavailable. Try again shortly.
error.rate_limited: Rate limited by {{source}}. Please wait before retrying.

meta.cached_warning: Showing cached data from {{date}}. Some information may be outdated.
